sizing_rule.note: Trade 1 unit for every $4 in equity. Position size = Current Equity / $4. Adjusts dynamically as account equity grows or shrinks. Example shows optimal f denominator of $4; general formula applies 1 unit per $X equity.

source_rule_text: Trade 1 unit for every $0.00 in equity, with the example showing 1 unit for every $4 in equity, adjusting position size as account equity grows or shrinks.
